title: Life Assistant: Persistent Multi-Agent System
description: An intelligent multi-agent life assistant with long-term memory, intent routing, and real-time web research.
longDescription: Designed and implemented a persistent multi-agent system using LangGraph-based orchestration with specialized nodes for intent detection, memory retrieval, web research, and response generation. Features Pydantic-based structured outputs and critique-based self-correction for personalized, context-aware decisions.

title: Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) Pipeline
description: Production-ready OCR and LLM inference pipeline processing 2,000+ invoices daily with 70% latency reduction.
longDescription: Designed an asynchronous FastAPI service that parallelized OCR and LLM inference stages, reducing multi-page document latency by ~70%. Built a hybrid routing layer across Qwen2.5-VL, YOLO layout detection, and OCR engines to select backends by layout complexity and cost. Deployed production pipeline processing 2,000-5,000+ invoices/day, achieving >95% field-level accuracy with <7s/page latency.

title: Intelligent Helpdesk Chatbot
description: Production RAG chatbot for internal technical support and enterprise knowledge retrieval.
longDescription: Architected and deployed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot designed to automate internal technical support. Engineered a complex RAG pipeline using LangChain and Qdrant for high-precision semantic search over enterprise knowledge bases. Implemented conversational retrieval by condensing multi-turn chat history, developed multimodal retrieval supporting technical documentation and images, and integrated Langfuse for end-to-end observability and prompt cost monitoring.

title: Agentic RAG Legal QA System
description: Multi-agent legal QA system with dual-layer RAG, fine-tuned models, and procedural validation.
longDescription: Architected a dual-layer RAG system for Vietnamese legal QA with structure-aware chunking, metadata-enriched retrieval, and procedural templates for multi-step statutory queries. Fine-tuned Llama 3 8B and Mistral 7B with QLoRA (4-bit quantization) on curated Vietnamese legal Q&A data to improve grounding and citation behavior. Built a multi-agent pipeline for routing, retrieval, guardrails, validation, and caching; benchmarked against single-step RAG baseline.

title: EV SHIFT: Data Quality Assurance Pipelines
description: AI-focused data collection and quality assurance pipelines for domain-specific datasets.
longDescription: Built data collection and quality assurance pipelines for domain-specific EV datasets including crawling, preprocessing, validation, and semantic consistency checks. Implemented AI-focused crawling with Playwright and Selenium, integrated Crawl4AI with LLMs for document processing, content quality scoring, prompt engineering, and task-specific generation with evaluation workflows.
